name: Project Horror Tales
short_description: When Travel plans go awry, the only way out is to face the darkness and find a way to survive to make it home alive. With something Lurking in the Dark. You are not alone.You will Have to Face the Darkness to Survive. The question is - Can you Survive?
detailed_description:
Project Horror Tale is a story driven first-person horror action maze game. When Travel plans go awry, the only way out is to face the darkness and find a way to survive to make it home alive.

This is the First Installment of Project Horror Tale. With something Lurking in the Dark. You are not alone. There something in there and they are looking for you. You will Have to Face the Darkness to Survive. The question is - Can you Survive?

Features:

  • Fast-paced Horror: No hiding in lockers here. Run for your life and run fast. The enemy can be tricked but not for long.
  • High Quality: AAA-quality graphics and creative designs give players a variety of unique and terrifying to survive.
  • Hazardous Environments: Enemy is not the only danger. The House seems like it is alive and it is full of traps, hazards, and other dangers to watch out for.
  • Unique Enemies: Roaming Enemy that will chase you down. A house that will trap you with in it.
